section_miscategorizations.text: and also has a past medical history of diabetes high blood pressure and high cholesterol
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history belongs with history/synthesis rather than the chief complaint; however, it is unlikely to mislead the reader about the primary reason for visit.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports swelling started approximately one to two months after starting norvasc.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is correctly placed in HPI as a patient-reported symptom with temporal relationship to a medication; no miscategorization.

section_miscategorizations.text: so the patient has edema in their legs.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a restatement/summary of the physical exam finding of lower extremity edema and is appropriate in the Findings section.
